summary: Battwheels OS Architectural Evolution Sprint - All 6 phases tested successfully. Backend API tests 25/25 passed. Frontend UI verification completed.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed tickets and failure cards created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 phases of the Battwheels OS Architectural Evolution Sprint are working correctly. Test file test_battwheels_evolution_sprint.py covers all phase APIs.

details: POST /api/v1/tickets auto-detects ticket_type: 'workshop' when no customer linked
POST /api/v1/tickets auto-detects ticket_type: 'onsite' when customer_name provided
GET /api/v1/tickets?ticket_type=workshop filters workshop tickets
GET /api/v1/tickets?ticket_type=onsite filters onsite tickets
Frontend Tickets page shows All/Onsite/Workshop filter tabs
TYPE column with badges (ONSITE/WORKSHOP) displayed correctly
HR role present in ROLE_HIERARCHY
/api/v1/hr/* routes accessible with owner role
HR & PAYROLL section visible in sidebar
POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/estimate/ensure creates estimate
GET /api/v1/tickets/{id}/estimate retrieves estimate
Ticket Detail page shows Estimate section with Create Estimate button
POST /api/v1/failure-cards creates failure card from ticket_id
GET /api/v1/failure-cards lists failure cards (paginated)
PUT /api/v1/failure-cards/{card_id} updates failure card
GET /api/health returns version: 2.5.0 and release_date
GET /api/v1/platform/version returns version info
Version v2.5.0 displayed in frontend sidebar footer
resolution_type dropdown NOT present in NewTicket form (correctly removed)
Login with demo@voltmotors.in / Demo@12345 works
Owner role can access all pages (Tickets, HR, Finance, etc.)
Dark + Volt design system properly implemented
Background #080C0F and accent #C8FF00 visible throughout UI

notes: Public customer-lookup endpoint requires subdomain routing which is not available in preview environment - this is expected behavior.
